changes: Lucid Dreaming is now acquired at level 14 (previously level 24).
Iron Will recast time reduced from 10 to 3 seconds.
Clemency execution no longer interrupts action combos.
Holy Spirit execution no longer interrupts action combos.
Requiescat additional effect added: Grants Blade of Faith Ready when the effect of Requiescat ends (duration 30s).
Holy Circle execution no longer interrupts action combos.
Confiteor additional effect added: Restores own HP (cure potency 400).
Blade of Faith no longer a combo action with Confiteor; requirement of 'Blade of Faith Ready' added; additional effect added: Restores own HP (cure potency 400).
Blade of Truth additional effect added: Restores own HP (cure potency 400).
Blade of Valor additional effect added: Restores own HP (cure potency 400).
Divine Magic Mastery II now adds a healing effect to Confiteor.
Defiance recast time reduced from 10 to 3 seconds.
Overpower area of effect changed from a cone to all nearby enemies.
Inner Release stacks now only apply to Fell Cleave and Decimate.

Inner Release additional effect 'Nullifies Stun, Sleep, Bind, Heavy, and most knockback and draw-in effects' changed to 'Grants Inner Strength, nullifying Stun, Sleep, Bind, Heavy, and most knockback and draw-in effects'.
Grit recast time reduced from 10 to 3 seconds.
Flood of Darkness potency reduced from 130 to 100.
Blood Weapon now grants 5 stacks of the Blood Weapon effect; duration increased from 10 to 15 seconds.
Stalwart Soul now acquired at level 40 (previously 72).
Living Dead additional effect added: Restores HP with each weaponskill successfully delivered or spell cast (cure potency 1,500).
Living Dead effect changed: If HP totaling maximum HP is restored before Walking Dead expires, effect changes to Undead Rebirth; while under Undead Rebirth, most attacks will not lower HP below 1.
Royal Guard recast time reduced from 10 to 3 seconds.
Perfect Balance can no longer be executed while under the effect of any Beast Chakra.
Jump animation shortened; now changes to Mirage Dive while under effect of Mirage Dive Ready.
High Jump animation shortened; now changes to Mirage Dive while under effect of Mirage Dive Ready.
Elusive Jump animation shortened.
Spineshatter Dive animation shortened.
Dragonfire Dive animation shortened.
Hide now dispels the effect of Doton upon execution.
Mug additional effect added: Increases target's damage taken by 5% (duration 20s).
Trick Attack additional effect changed to: Increases damage you deal target by 10%.
Aeolian Edge potency increased from 360 to 380; rear combo potency increased from 420 to 440.
Shukuchi animation shortened.
Doton potency increased from 70 to 80; effect duration reduced from 24 to 18 seconds.
Hakke Mujinsatsu combo potency increased from 120 to 130.
Armor Crush combo potency increased from 340 to 360; flank combo potency increased from 400 to 420.
Bhavacakra potency reduced from 400 to 350.
Phantom Kamaitachi potency increased from 550 to 600.
Melee Mastery now acquired at level 74 (previously 84).
Melee Mastery II (Level 84) added: Increases potency of Spinning Edge to 220 and Gust Slash to 160.
Hakaze potency increased from 180 to 200.
Jinpu potency increased from 100 to 120.
Third Eye effect duration increased from 3 to 4 seconds.
Shifu potency increased from 100 to 120.
Gekko potency increased from 100 to 120; combo potency increased from 320 to 330; rear combo potency increased from 370 to 380.
Higanbana DoT potency increased from 30 to 45.
Mangetsu combo potency increased from 110 to 120.
Kasha potency increased from 100 to 120; combo potency increased from 320 to 330; flank combo potency increased from 370 to 380.
Tenka Goken area of effect changed from a cone to all nearby enemies.
Oka combo potency increased from 110 to 120.
Yukikaze potency increased from 100 to 120; combo potency increased from 280 to 300.
Midare Setsugekka potency reduced from 660 to 600; attack is now a guaranteed critical hit.
Meikyo Shisui: Ranged weaponskills no longer count toward this effect.
Hissatsu: Shinten now acquired at level 52 (previously 62); potency reduced from 270 to 250.
Hissatsu: Yaten backstep activation time adjusted.
Hissatsu: Kyuten now acquired at level 62 (previously 64).
Kaeshi: Higanbana potency reduced from 300 to 200.
Kaeshi: Goken potency reduced from 420 to 280; area of effect changed from a cone to all nearby enemies.
Kaeshi: Setsugekka potency reduced from 990 to 600; attack is now a guaranteed critical hit.
Shoha potency reduced from 580 to 500.
Ogi Namikiri potency reduced from 900 to 800; attack is now a guaranteed critical hit.
Kaeshi: Namikiri potency reduced from 1,350 to 800; attack is now a guaranteed critical hit.
Way of the Samurai (Level 66) added: Increases potency of Hakaze, Jinpu, and Shifu.
Way of the Samurai II (Level 84) added: Increases potency of Gekko, Kasha, and Yukikaze.
Hissatsu: Kaiten removed.
Hell's Ingress duration of Enhanced Harpe increased from 15 to 20 seconds; animation shortened.
Hell's Egress duration of Enhanced Harpe increased from 15 to 20 seconds; animation shortened.
Regress animation shortened.
Repelling Shot range increased from 5 to 15 yalms; backstep activation time adjusted.
Battle Voice no longer requires Mage's Ballad, Army's Paeon, or The Wanderer's Minuet to be active.
The Wanderer's Minuet now changes to Pitch Perfect upon execution.
Heat Blast potency increased from 170 to 180.
Wildfire potency increase per weaponskill landed increased from 150 to 200.
Drill potency increased from 570 to 580.
Air Anchor potency increased from 570 to 580.
Pile Bunker potency increased from 650 to 680.
Crowned Collider potency increased from 750 to 780.
Chain Saw potency increased from 570 to 580.
Standard Step, Emboite, Entrechat, Jete, Pirouette, and Technical Step are now categorized as weaponskills.
Flourishing Symmetry/Flow status effects renamed/replaced by Silken Symmetry/Flow effects in various combos.
Reverse Cascade, Rising Windmill, Fountainfall, and Bloodshower requirements adjusted to Silken or Flourishing states.
Ruby Ruin/Outburst/Ruin II/Ruin III/Rite/Disaster/Catastrophe recast time increased from 2.5 to 3 seconds.
Ruby Ruin/Outburst/Ruin II/Ruin III/Rite/Disaster/Catastrophe potencies increased.
Searing Light now executed directly from the caster rather than via Carbuncle.
Ruin Mastery IV adjusted to reflect Ruby Rite potency increase.
Displacement animation shortened.
Stone, Aero, Stone II, Aero II MP costs reduced.
Stone III, Stone IV potencies reduced; MP costs reduced.
Aero/Aero II effect duration increased from 18 to 30 seconds.
Regen MP cost reduced.
Cure III AoE radius increased from 6 to 10 yalms.
Asylum range increased from 8 to 10 yalms.
Secret of the Lily gauge generation reduced from 30s to 20s.
Afflatus Misery potency increased from 900 to 1,240; reduction after first enemy increased from 25% to 50%.
Liturgy of the Bell additional healing effect now triggers when time expires or upon re-execution.
Ruin, Bio, Bio II MP costs reduced.
Embrace range increased.
Sacred Soil AoE radius increased from 8 to 10 yalms.
Expedient effect duration reduced from 20 to 10 seconds.
Combust effect duration increased from 18 to 30 seconds.
Dosis MP cost reduced.
Soteria now grants 4 stacks; effect potency increased from 50% to 70%.
Addersting now grants maximum stacks upon entering/restarting an instance.
PvP actions have been fully reworked.
Maximum HP and MP for all jobs has been adjusted.
Job gauges no longer display.
Damage modifiers for both damage taken and dealt have been adjusted on a per-job basis.
Damage taken and dealt will no longer be subject to RNG.
Resistance effects will no longer be applied upon the expiration of status afflictions.
The adrenaline gauge has been changed to the limit gauge.
Each job will have its own unique limit break action.

new_content.name: Aglaia
new_content.description: The first installment in the new alliance raid series, Myths of the Realm, which delves into the mysteries surrounding the Twelve.

new_content.name: The Porta Decumana
new_content.description: New trial featuring the battle with the Ultima Weapon, formerly part of The Praetorium.

new_content.name: Crystalline Conflict
new_content.description: A new type of PvP match between small teams transporting a tactical crystal.

new_content.name: Duty Support
new_content.description: A system that allows solo players to tackle duties with a party of NPCs.

new_content.name: Unending Codex
new_content.description: A compendium of vital information about in-game terminology and characters.

new_content.name: Adventurer Plate (Beta Version)
new_content.description: An interface that allows you to create a personalized calling card to introduce yourself to other players.

new_content.name: A Mission in Mor Dhona
new_content.description: Chronicles of a New Era quest for Myths of the Realm.

housing.name: Amaurotine Interior Wall
housing.description: An interior wall recreated from the memory of a city long since destroyed.

housing.name: Highland Flooring
housing.description: Floorboards designed to complement highland residences.

housing.name: Amaurotine Flooring
housing.description: Elegant stone flooring recreated from the memory of a city long since destroyed.

housing.name: Highland Pendant Lamp
housing.description: A pendant lamp designed to complement highland residences.

housing.name: Deluxe Highland Pendant Lamp
housing.description: A large pendant lamp designed to complement highland residences.

housing.name: Highland Chandelier
housing.description: A sumptuous chandelier designed to complement highland residences.

housing.name: Amaurotine Spire Chandelier
housing.description: A breathtaking light fixture resembling the once-proud spires of a city long since destroyed.

housing.name: Snowy Red Brick Bench
housing.description: Someone might have sat here, alone in the snow, thinking of warmer days since passed...

housing.name: Sweet Lawn Ornaments
housing.description: Giant, lifelike lawn ornaments that look tasty enough to lick.

housing.name: Damaged Ishgardian Wall
housing.description: A damaged wall preserved for posterity during the Ishgardian Restoration.

housing.name: Ishgardian Lamppost
housing.description: A lamppost of steel such as one might see lining an Ishgardian street. Authentically frigid!

housing.name: Alpine Open-air Bath
housing.description: A luxurious, outdoor bath designed in the alpine fashion.

housing.name: Ivy-covered Bridge
housing.description: A stone bridge tastefully hemmed with tendrils of creeping ivy.

housing.name: Garden Gate
housing.description: Curious what lies beyond the garden wall? The garden gate is here to help.

housing.name: Planter Set
housing.description: A vibrant arrangement of plant life bursting from a cluster of sturdy planters.

housing.name: Curved Marble Partition
housing.description: A gently curved, cream-colored partition with a white marble baseboard.

housing.name: Scholasticate Chair
housing.description: A wooden chair much like those found at Saint Endalim's Scholasticate.

housing.name: Scholasticate Bookshelf
housing.description: A laden bookshelf much like those found at Saint Endalim's Scholasticate.

housing.name: Royal Menagerie Phasmascape
housing.description: This advanced magitek contraption displays the splendor of Ala Mhigo's Royal Menagerie under a dying sun.

housing.name: Sea of Clouds Phasmascape
housing.description: This advanced magitek contraption displays the bevy of isles floating above Abalathia's Spine.

housing.name: Log Rack
housing.description: A lovely rack to organize your logs.

housing.name: Indoor Marble Fountain
housing.description: A fountain carved from deep-sea marble and whimsically decorated with Moogle statuettes.

housing.name: Eastern Canopy Bed
housing.description: Sleep in luxury under a canopy of softly blooming flowers from the Far East.

housing.name: Eulmoran Divan
housing.description: A cushioned settee expressly designed for contemplating one's more opulent sins.

housing.name: Trick Bookshelf Partition
housing.description: Pull the correct tome from the shelf to trigger the hidden door. Perfect for bibliophiles with a secret agenda.

housing.name: Factory Pillar
housing.description: A rusted metal pillar with an uncanny resemblance to those found in the Copied Factory.

housing.name: Indoor Climbing Frame
housing.description: A curious, latticelike structure that inspires rampant frolicking and climbing upon contact.

housing.name: Alpine Cabinet
housing.description: A decorative cabinet designed in the alpine style.

housing.name: Scholasticate Table
housing.description: A long desk much like those found at Saint Endalim's Scholasticate.

housing.name: Classic Dresser
housing.description: A lavish vanity that hearkens back to days long past.

housing.name: Riviera Swinging-door Counter
housing.description: Be advised not to let the doors of this handsome counter hit you on the way out.

housing.name: Steel Locker
housing.description: A metal cupboard perfectly suited for stowing cleaning instruments, sundry items, and lithographs of your sweetheart.

housing.name: House Fortemps Fireplace
housing.description: A faithful replica of the fireplace found in Fortemps Manor.

housing.name: Cathedral Lectern
housing.description: An uncanny recreation of the lectern used in Saint Reymanaud's Cathedral.

housing.name: Astrologicum Star Map
housing.description: An august chart rich with the secrets of the heavens. Good for study and impressing your guests.

housing.name: Wondrous Parfait
housing.description: A massive dessert layered with plenty of fresh fruit, whipped cream, and frozen confectionary.

housing.name: Bluefeather Astrolabos
housing.description: A hauntingly beautiful model of the universe.

housing.name: Small Blackboard
housing.description: Experience the joy of slapping two dusty erasers together again and again.

housing.name: Alpine Wall Lantern
housing.description: A wall lantern crafted in the alpine style.

housing.name: Emperor Portrait
housing.description: A commissioned portrait of the Garlean Empire's founding father, Solus zos Galvus, entitled Beyond the Horizon.

housing.name: Azure Banner of Conflict
housing.description: A brilliant blue banner distributed at the Wolves' Den.

housing.name: Crimson Banner of Conflict
housing.description: A fierce red banner distributed at the Wolves' Den.

housing.name: Kweh-kweh Clock
housing.description: A charming chronometer designed to alert you of the time with a rousing "Kweh-kweh!" at convenient intervals.

housing.name: Ivy Curtain
housing.description: A natural veil of trailing greenery.

housing.name: Luminous Wooden Loft
housing.description: All the fun of a regular wooden loft, now with built-in light fixtures!

housing.name: Ironworks Tool Set
housing.description: A set of Garlond Ironworks' finest instruments.

housing.name: Imitation Alpine Window
housing.description: Who needs a house in the freezing peaks when you can mount a frosty windowpane upon your wall instead?

housing.name: Alpine Doormat
housing.description: A welcome mat designed to complement alpine residences.

glamour.description: A banded chest containing a spotted fedora and spencer.

glamour.name: Coeurl Beach Womenswear Coffer
glamour.description: A banded chest containing a flashy set of spotted swimwear.

glamour.name: Coeurl Beach Menswear Coffer
glamour.description: A banded chest containing a flashy set of spotted swimwear.

glamour.name: Archfiend Attire Coffer
